Packaging built for shelf impact.

G Flexipack is a flexible packaging manufacturer in Bharuch, Gujarat — custom-printed pouches for food, beverage and lifestyle brands. Thirteen formats, printed, laminated and converted under one roof.

Welcome to our company

Quality packaging, since 2016.

G Flexipack is a Bharuch-based flexible packaging manufacturer producing custom-printed pouches for food, beverage, pharma, personal care, agrochemical, industrial and household brands — 13 formats, printed, laminated and converted under one roof.

More about us →

Our Vision

To be the flexible packaging partner of choice for brands that care how their product lands on shelf.

Our Mission

Design and print custom pouches that protect the product and represent the brand.

8-colour rotogravure✻ Food-grade barrier films✻ ISO 9001:2015✻ 250+ tons a month✻ Solvent-less lamination✻ 60,000+ sq ft climate-controlled plant✻ Exporting from Mundra Port✻
8-colour rotogravure✻ Food-grade barrier films✻ ISO 9001:2015✻ 250+ tons a month✻ Solvent-less lamination✻ 60,000+ sq ft climate-controlled plant✻ Exporting from Mundra Port✻

Our products

Thirteen formats, printed to spec.

Custom dimensions, laminate structures, barrier levels and full-colour rotogravure print — all produced in-house.

Infrastructure

60,000+ sq ft in Bharuch, Gujarat.

i

8-Colour Rotogravure Press

Auto registration and web guiding for precise multi-colour print — deep, repeatable colour across long runs.

ii

Solvent-Less & Solvent-Based Lamination

Food-safe multi-layer bonding and specialised barrier structures, matched to the product inside.

iii

Precision Slitting Lines

Tension-controlled winding to exact reel widths, ready for downstream pouching or delivery as film rolls.

iv

Centre- & Side-Seal Pouching

Finished pouches converted in-house — every format from stand-up to spout, sealed and inspected on line.

Why us

What sets us apart.

🛡️

Assured Quality

ISO 9001:2015 systems and an in-house ASTM lab — eight tests on every batch, full documentation at dispatch.

🚚

On-Time Delivery

3–5 week production lead times, honestly quoted and tracked — with sea freight coordinated from Mundra Port.

🎯

Customized Solutions

Structure, size, barrier and finish engineered per product — recommendation within 24 hours of your brief.

⚙️

Advanced Machinery

8-colour rotogravure with auto registration, solvent-less lamination, precision slitting and pouching lines.

🧑‍🏭

Skilled Workforce

An experienced production and QC team under the Gangamani group's 20+ years of manufacturing discipline.

♻️

100% Recyclable Options

Mono-material LLDPE structures for EPR-compliant brands — sustainability without sacrificing shelf appeal.

Custom-printed pouches, in thirteen formats.

Home/Products/Stand-Up Pouches

Stand-Up Pouches.

A stand-up pouch stays upright on shelf thanks to its bottom gusset, so your brand faces the shopper. Sealed sides protect the product, an optional press-to-close zipper adds reusability, and a choice of finishes and thicknesses tailors the pouch to what you pack.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureZipper optional
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Upright on shelfThe bottom gusset expands when filled so the pouch stands and faces the shopper — no shelf tray needed.
Resealable zipperOptional press-to-close zipper keeps contents fresh for repeat use.
Full-colour printUp to 8-colour rotogravure with matte, gloss or metallic finishes and spot effects.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

PET / METPET / PE MATTE BOPP / METPET / PE PET / PE BOPA / PE PET / Alu / PE PET / Alu / BOPA / PE PE / PE Alox PET / PE MDOPE / PE — Recyclable

Commonly packed products

Snacks & namkeen Coffee & tea Dry fruits & confectionery Pet treats Powders & premixes

Spec your stand-up pouches.

Send dimensions, quantity, barrier needs and artwork status — structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →

MOQ 500kg● payment 30 / 70● lead time 3–5 weeks

Home/Products/Zipper Pouches

Zipper Pouches.

Zipper pouches add a press-to-close seal that turns single-use packaging into a resealable pack — ideal for products consumed over days or weeks. The zipper runs below a tamper-evident top seal, so the pack ships secure and opens easy.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosurePress-to-close zipper
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Reseal, again and againPress-to-close zipper keeps the pack fresh between uses — a clear on-shelf advantage.
Tamper-evidentA heat seal above the zipper ships the product secure until first open.
Any format baseZippers fit stand-up, flat-bottom and gusseted bodies alike.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

PET / METPET / PE MATTE BOPP / METPET / PE PET / PE BOPA / PE PET / Alu / PE PET / Alu / BOPA / PE PE / PE Alox PET / PE MDOPE / PE — Recyclable

Commonly packed products

Snacks & trail mix Dry fruits & nuts Cereals & granola Frozen & chilled Repeat-use grocery

Spec your zipper pouches.

Send dimensions, quantity, barrier needs and artwork status — structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →

MOQ 500kg● payment 30 / 70● lead time 3–5 weeks

Home/Products/Gusseted Pouches

Gusseted Pouches.

Side- and bottom-gusset pouches expand to hold high volumes in a compact footprint, which is why they remain the workhorse pack for coffee, flour and grains. A back centre seal keeps the print faces clean, and a tin-tie or valve can be added on request.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureOptional tin-tie / valve
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

High fill volumeSide or bottom gussets open out to hold more in a slim shelf footprint.
Clean print facesA back centre seal keeps the front and back panels uninterrupted for branding.
Coffee-readyOne-way degassing valves and tin-ties can be fitted for roasted coffee.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

PET / METPET / PE MATTE BOPP / METPET / PE PET / PE BOPA / PE PET / Alu / PE PET / Alu / BOPA / PE PE / PE Alox PET / PE MDOPE / PE — Recyclable

Commonly packed products

Coffee beans & ground Flour, atta & grains Tea Powders Bulk snacks

Spec your gusseted pouches.

Send dimensions, quantity, barrier needs and artwork status — structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →

MOQ 500kg● payment 30 / 70● lead time 3–5 weeks

Home/Products/Centre Seal Pouches

Centre Seal Pouches.

Also called pillow or fin-seal packs, centre-seal pouches are the most economical way to run high-speed, high-volume lines. A single back seam and top-and-bottom seals make them fast to fill and light on material — the default for snacks and namkeen.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureFin / lap seal
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Built for speedRuns on vertical and horizontal form-fill-seal lines at high throughput.
Material-efficientA single back seam uses less film per pack — lower cost per unit.
Roll or pouchSupplied as finished pouches or as printed roll stock for your own FFS line.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

PET / METPET / PE MATTE BOPP / METPET / PE PET / PE BOPA / PE PET / Alu / PE PET / Alu / BOPA / PE PE / PE Alox PET / PE MDOPE / PE — Recyclable

Commonly packed products

Snacks & namkeen Wafers & chips Biscuits Confectionery FFS lines

Spec your centre seal pouches.

Send dimensions, quantity, barrier needs and artwork status — structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →

MOQ 500kg● payment 30 / 70● lead time 3–5 weeks

Home/Products/Vacuum Pouches

Vacuum Pouches.

Vacuum pouches use high-barrier nylon/PE structures that evacuate air to slow spoilage and extend shelf life. Puncture-resistant and freeze-safe, they are the standard for meat, seafood, cheese and other perishables.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures4 laminates
ClosureVacuum-sealed
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Extended freshnessAir is evacuated and the high-barrier film locks out oxygen, slowing spoilage.
Puncture-resistantNylon-based structures survive sharp bones, stacking and deep-freeze handling.
Freeze & chill safeStays flexible and seal-tight from freezer to display.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

BOPA / PE (nylon-PE) PET / Alu / PE PET / PE High-clarity PA / PE MDOPE / PE — Recyclable

Commonly packed products

Meat & poultry Seafood Cheese & dairy Frozen foods Ready-to-cook

Spec your vacuum pouches.

Send dimensions, quantity, barrier needs and artwork status — structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →

MOQ 500kg● payment 30 / 70● lead time 3–5 weeks

Home/Products/Re-usable Pouches

Re-usable Pouches.

Heavy-gauge resealable pouches built for products bought in bulk and used over time — large pet-food packs, detergents and refill formats. Reinforced seals and carry features handle the weight; the zipper keeps the pack usable to the last serving.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureZipper + reinforced seals
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Carries the weightReinforced K- or Doyen seals and optional die-cut handles hold heavy fills.
Reseal for the long haulDurable zippers keep multi-week products fresh to the last use.
Refill-readyLightweight refill formats cut cost and plastic versus rigid tubs.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

Home/Products/3-Side Seal Pouches

3-Side Seal Pouches.

Flat three-side-seal sachets are the go-to for single-serve and sample formats — sealed on three edges with one filling edge. Compact, low-cost and easy to strip off a line, they suit spices, ORS, condiments and trial packs.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureThree-edge seal
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Single-serve readyCompact flat format ideal for one-use doses and samples.
Tear-notch openingEasy-tear notches let consumers open without scissors.
Low cost per packMinimal material and fast filling keep unit costs down at volume.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Home/Products/4-Side Seal Bags

4-Side Seal Bags.

Four-side-seal bags are sealed on all four edges for a flat, premium presentation and a strong, even seal all round. The format suits face masks, wet wipes, pharma and any product that benefits from a clean, framed front panel.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureFour-edge seal
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Premium flat packSealed on all four sides for a clean, framed panel and a quality feel.
Strong all-round sealEven sealing on every edge protects liquids, gels and wipes.
Precise dosingConsistent fill volumes for cosmetic and pharma single-serves.

Home/Products/Spout Pouches

Spout Pouches.

Spout pouches carry a welded spout and screw cap for pourable, resealable liquid packaging — juices, sauces, baby food and energy gels. Leak-proof spout welds and burst-tested seals let them replace bottles at a fraction of the plastic.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureWelded spout + cap
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Pour & resealA screw-cap spout makes the pack pourable and reclosable.
Leak-proof weldsSpout welds and seals are burst-strength tested for liquids.
Bottle replacementDelivers the same convenience as a bottle with far less plastic and freight.

Poly Film Rolls.

Printed laminate roll stock supplied to exact reel widths for your own form-fill-seal lines. Tension-controlled slitting delivers clean, ready-to-run reels — the same print and barrier as our pouches, converted on your machines.

Lead time3–5 weeks

Run on your linePrinted, laminated reels slit to your exact FFS web width.
Tension-controlledPrecision winding gives clean, defect-free roll stock.
Same barrier, your machineIdentical print and barrier structures as our finished pouches.

Home/Products/Retort Pouches

Retort Pouches.

Retort pouches are engineered to survive steam sterilisation up to 121°C, giving shelf-stable ready meals, curries and gravies months of ambient life without refrigeration. High-barrier PET/Alu/CPP structures hold seal integrity through the retort cycle.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures3 laminates
ClosureRetort-grade seal
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Sterilise to 121°CWithstands full steam-retort processing without seal failure.
Ambient shelf lifeDelivers months of shelf-stable life with no cold chain.
Full-barrier buildPET/Alu/CPP laminates block oxygen, light and moisture.

Structure options

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

PET / Alu / CPP PET / BOPA / Alu / CPP PET / Nylon / CPP (transparent retort) MDOPE / PE — Recyclable

Commonly packed products

Ready meals & curries Gravies & dals Soups & sauces Seafood & meat Institutional catering

Spec your retort pouches.

Send dimensions, quantity, barrier needs and artwork status — structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →

MOQ 500kg● payment 30 / 70● lead time 3–5 weeks

Home/Products/Breathing Pouches

Breathing Pouches.

Micro-perforated breathing pouches let produce respire so fresh fruit, vegetables and grains stay crisp longer. Controlled perforation manages moisture and gas exchange — the modified-atmosphere answer for fresh and semi-fresh products.

Get a quote →All formats →
Min. order500kg
Lead time3–5 weeks
Structures8 laminates
ClosureMicro-perforated
Print8-colour rotogravure

Key features

Why brands choose this format.

Lets produce breatheControlled micro-perforation manages gas exchange to slow spoilage.
Moisture balanceReduces condensation and fog for a cleaner pack on shelf.
Fresh for longerExtends the sellable window for respiring fruit, veg and grains.

Laminate structures, engineered per product.

Barrier, stiffness and seal strength are chosen for what you pack — not off a shelf.

Home/Industries/Food & Grocery

Food & Grocery packaging.

From snacks and coffee to spices and frozen meals, food brands need packaging that keeps product fresh for months and looks sharp on a crowded shelf. We build high-barrier, food-safe structures and print them in deep, repeatable rotogravure colour.

Get a quote →All industries →

What we pack

Built for the food shelf.

Snacks & namkeen Coffee & tea Spices & masalas Frozen & ready meals Baby food Bakery & confectionery

Typical build: High-barrier metallised film with a food-safe inner seal; degassing valves for coffee.

Home/Industries/Beverages

Beverages packaging.

Liquid brands are moving from bottles to pouches for lighter freight and a better shelf story. Our welded spout pouches and burst-tested seals carry juices, sauces and energy gels leak-free, ambient or chilled.

Get a quote →All industries →

What we pack

Built for the beverages shelf.

Juice & fruit drinks Sauces & purées Energy gels Bag-in-box liners Liquid concentrates

Typical build: Leak-proof welded spout, burst-strength tested seals, high-barrier liquid structures.

Home/About

About G Flexipack · Bharuch, Gujarat · Est. 2016

The pouches behind India's everyday brands.

For nearly a decade, G Flexipack has quietly manufactured the flexible packaging that carries India's food, medicine, harvest, and homes — from D2C launches on Mumbai shelves to pharma sachets in rural clinics to agrochemicals on Gujarat farms.

One roof. Thirteen pouch formats. Seven industries. Every pouch printed, laminated and converted in-house at our Bharuch facility.

Built for brands that can't afford compromises.

🏭 One-roof manufacturingPrint, laminate, convert — every step happens under our supervision. No vendor chains, no quality drift.
📏 13 formats, one callFrom stand-up pouches to retort packs to spouted formats — you don't need multiple suppliers.
🧪 Compliance-ready filmsFood-grade, pharma-approved, agrochemical-tough. The right barrier for the right shelf.
⚡ Growth-friendly MOQsWhether you're launching or scaling, we make it work — without dropping standards.
🎨 Print that sellsRotogravure precision, consistent shade-matching, artwork that survives the supply chain.

Four values, one standard.

Precision

Every micron, every millimetre, every registration mark — measured and matched.

Partnership

We treat your pouch like a product, not a purchase order — we stay in the loop.

Pace

From artwork approval to airtight pouch — we own every step.

Proof

Quality-checked, shade-verified, seal-tested — if it doesn't meet the standard, it doesn't ship.

Why us

What sets us apart.

🛡️

Assured Quality

ISO 9001:2015 systems and an in-house ASTM lab — eight tests on every batch, full documentation at dispatch.

🚚

On-Time Delivery

3–5 week production lead times, honestly quoted and tracked — with sea freight coordinated from Mundra Port.

🎯

Customized Solutions

Structure, size, barrier and finish engineered per product — recommendation within 24 hours of your brief.

⚙️

Advanced Machinery

8-colour rotogravure with auto registration, solvent-less lamination, precision slitting and pouching lines.

🧑‍🏭

Skilled Workforce

An experienced production and QC team under the Gangamani group's 20+ years of manufacturing discipline.

♻️

100% Recyclable Options

Mono-material LLDPE structures for EPR-compliant brands — sustainability without sacrificing shelf appeal.

Home/Quality

Quality & certification

Audited, tested, documented.

We build every pouch to a specification and prove it in our own lab. Here's how the film is engineered — and how each batch is verified before it ships.

✦

ISO 9001:2015

Certified quality management system across procurement, production and dispatch.

✦

ASTM Standard QC

Eight-test laboratory verification on every batch — GSM to heat-seal strength.

✦

100% Recyclable Options

Mono-material structures available for EPR-compliant, sustainability-first brands.

The lab

Eight tests. Every batch.

Raw material inspected on arrival, colour verified before print, tested in-line at every stage, documented at dispatch.

  1. 01GSMfilm weight is consistent, roll to roll
  2. 02COFruns smoothly on high-speed filling lines
  3. 03Bond strengthlaminate layers never separate
  4. 04Puncture resistancesurvives transit, stacking and handling
  5. 05Burst strengthseals hold under internal pressure
  6. 06Scrub testprint doesn't rub off in the supply chain
  7. 07Heat seal strengthevery seam holds, every time
  8. 08Tear strengthopens where it should — nowhere else
“Quality without compromise.”

Quality policy · tested to ASTM standards

ISO 9001:2015ASTM Standard QC100% Recyclable Options

Inside the film

A pouch is three decisions, laminated together.

What keeps chips crisp for nine months isn't the print — it's the structure behind it. Scroll through the layers we bond for every job.

Print · BOPP / PET
Barrier · MET-PET / AL
Seal · LLDPE / CPP

One film. Your structure.

01

The print carrier

Your artwork is reverse-printed in up to eight colours on rotogravure — so the ink sits inside the laminate. It can't scuff, scratch or fade on shelf, no matter how rough the supply chain is.

02

The barrier core

Metallised PET or aluminium foil blocks oxygen, moisture and light. This layer is why roasted, fried and dried products stay fresh for months — and it's specified per product, not per catalogue.

03

The food-contact seal

LLDPE or CPP on the inside — food-grade, heat-sealable, and strong enough to run on high-speed filling lines without splitting a single seam.

04

Bonded into one film

Solvent-less lamination fuses the layers into a single web — then it's slit, pouched and batch-tested in our own QC lab before dispatch. Common structures we run:

BOPP / MET-PET / PEPET / AL / LLDPEMono LLDPE — recyclableCPP / AL / PETPET / PE

Packaging you can document and defend.

Every order ships with test documentation. Send your brief for a structure recommendation within 24 hours.

Get a quote →
